segment.source: Show selection when braille is tethered to review
segment.target: Show selection when braille is tethered to review

segment.source: Good to know before using this addon
segment.target: Good to know before using this addon

segment.source: There are likely very few users which means that more or less use cases are not tested. This means greater probability of issues.
segment.target: There are likely very few users which means that more or less use cases are not tested. This means greater probability of issues.

segment.source: General
segment.target: General

segment.source: To use this addon, tether braille to review in NVDA settings Braille category.
segment.target: To use this addon, tether braille to review in NVDA settings Braille category.

segment.source: You likely want also that review cursor follows system caret most of time
segment.target: You likely want also that review cursor follows system caret most of time

segment.source: (see NVDA settings Review Cursor category). Selection is shown in edit controls
segment.target: (see NVDA settings Review Cursor category). Selection is shown in edit controls

segment.source: and documents with dots 7 and 8 when "Show selection" is enabled in NVDA
segment.target: and documents with dots 7 and 8 when "Show selection" is enabled in NVDA

segment.source: settings Braille category. When braille is tethered to review and review
segment.target: settings Braille category. When braille is tethered to review and review

segment.source: follows caret, review cursor is positioned to end of selected text when
segment.target: follows caret, review cursor is positioned to end of selected text when

segment.source: selection changes so you can see immediately how it changed.
segment.target: selection changes so you can see immediately how it changed.

segment.source: You can easily see what you have selected for example for copying or formatting
segment.target: You can easily see what you have selected for example for copying or formatting

segment.source: in text editor. You can move around edit control or document with braille
segment.target: in text editor. You can move around edit control or document with braille

segment.source: gestures and text review commands which move braille display. Movement does not
segment.target: gestures and text review commands which move braille display. Movement does not

segment.source: affect on caret, and it is not restricted to selected text. It means that
segment.target: affect on caret, and it is not restricted to selected text. It means that

segment.source: you can investigate both selected and unselected part of text with braille.
segment.target: you can investigate both selected and unselected part of text with braille.

segment.source: You can use routing buttons to move review position and/or caret according to
segment.target: You can use routing buttons to move review position and/or caret according to

segment.source: NVDA Braille category "Move system caret when routing review cursor" setting.
segment.target: NVDA Braille category "Move system caret when routing review cursor" setting.

segment.source: Notes
segment.target: Notes

segment.source: If "Show selection" is disabled, review cursor is positioned to end of
segment.target: If "Show selection" is disabled, review cursor is positioned to end of

segment.source: selected text when braille is tethered to review, review follows caret and
segment.target: selected text when braille is tethered to review, review follows caret and

segment.source: selection changes.
segment.target: selection changes.

segment.source: To see selection outside of edit controls, browse mode should be used
segment.target: To see selection outside of edit controls, browse mode should be used

segment.source: where supported.
segment.target: where supported.

segment.source: Known issues
segment.target: Known issues

segment.source: In MS Word when UIA is not used, review cursor may be positioned to the start of selection when edit control gets focus.
segment.target: In MS Word when UIA is not used, review cursor may be positioned to the start of selection when edit control gets focus.
